decisions.rationale: Observation already resolves to its own base_record_id corridor_webster-ave-bronx, which matches exactly: same corridor (Webster Avenue), borough (Bronx), limits (The Hub to Williamsbridge), bus route (Bx41), and source. No different registry record matches; corridor_webster-avenue-sbs has different limits (Harlem River to The Hub vs The Hub to Williamsbridge). Per identity rules, when the closest match IS the observation's own base_record_id, decision is new.

evidence_refs.source_quote: ■ Based on the existing Bx41 route that carries over 20,000 daily riders ■ 5.3 miles from The Hub to Williamsbridge
